issues_processed.title: [Feature Request] Add isMalicious.com as a data source
issues_processed.author: hexablob
issues_processed.body_preview:
## Maintainer Triage

Thank you for the feature request. We attempted to access the provided blocklist URLs (e.g., https://ismalicious.com/api/blocklist/download/blocklist-domains-all.txt) but they returned HTML error pages (possibly due to access restrictions or incorrect URL).

To evaluate this data source, we need a working direct link to a plain-text blocklist (one domain per line) that we can automatically fetch and verify.

Please provide:
1. A working URL to a sample blocklist (e.g

issues_processed.title: 0.0.0.0 does not work with IPv6.
issues_processed.author: alsyundawy
issues_processed.body_preview:
## Maintainer Triage

Thank you for raising this important point about IPv6 support.

Upon reviewing the blocklist format (e.g., in malware.txt), we see that entries are currently in the format "0.0.0.0 domain". As noted, this does not block IPv6 traffic.

We acknowledge that adding ":: domain" entries would be necessary for full IPv6 coverage. However, before making such a change, we need to consider:
1. Backward compatibility: ensuring existing tools that parse these files continue to work.
2.

issues_processed.title: [Add request]
issues_processed.author: yxkhkhiw
issues_processed.body_preview:
URL you wish to be added: kazwex.com

Why you believe this should be added: 

A fake promotional image is circulating on Discord, claiming that YouTuber MrBeast is giving away $2,500 via kazwex.com using a promo code "BONUS".

Trustpilot reports confirming the scam: https://www.trustpilot.com/review/kazwex.com

Image used in the scam:  
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5046bf63-042e-4206-aff5-0abddba5fa38)

Add to list: scam, phishing
